## What should Miser do?

Describe the feature.

## Where does this fit?

- [ ] Proxy/runtime
- [ ] Console/UI
- [ ] Audit/importer
- [ ] Pricing
- [ ] Rules/policy
- [ ] Documentation

## Why does it matter?

What spend, workflow, or operational problem would this solve?

## Acceptance criteria

What would make this complete?
